title: TargetESP
description: Lightweight TargetESP mod. Highlights visible targets with health-based colors and smooth animations.
body:
## **TargetESP mod.**
![One of the types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea28635d006fc7cabad541fd39c6e8c3cf77209a.png)


A clean and performance-friendly TargetESP mod for Minecraft PVP that respects server rules and anti-cheat systems.

# ✨ **Features**

3 ESP Styles: Ghosts, Circle, and Square modes

Health-Based Colors: ESP color changes based on target's health (green to red)

Anti-Cheat Friendly:

Doesn't show invisible players

Doesn't see through walls

Only highlights visible targets

8 Color Presets: Cyan, Pink, Purple, Green, Orange, Red, Blue, Yellow

Smooth Animations: Ghost particles and fade-out effects

Customizable: Adjust ghost count, animation speed, and target filters

# ⚙️ **Usage**

Default bind: Right Shift to open GUI

Hover over entities to highlight them

Configure colors and styles in settings

# 🛡️ **Compliance**

This mod is designed to be undetectable and compliant with most server rules:

No wallhacks or visibility cheats

No invisible player detection

Only works on what you can normally see

# 🔧 Technical

Version: Fabric 1.21

Stable: Tested and reliable

Perfect for PVP enthusiasts who want visual assistance without breaking server rules!
